steps.title: Find the significance
steps.content: The last sentence states that linocut printing helped Carter's work reach a wide audience and supported her aim to unite Black women through her art. That is the key significance of the technique.

steps.title: Reject unstated claims
steps.content: Choice A mentions material availability, which the passage never discusses. Choice C invents commercial success. Choice D invents a claim that Carter was among the first Black artists to use linocuts. The remaining choice restates connection through art. The answer is B.
